ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie in its native language */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget for the movie production */,
  "budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the budget */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the movie (e.g., Action, Adventure) */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL for the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview or summary of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., Released, In Production) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or promotional slogan for the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie was produced */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age rating or certification */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "revenue_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "marketing_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for marketing */,
  "marketing_budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the marketing budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoken language */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the language is associated with */,
  "iso_639_1" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "subtitles" TEXT /* Languages in which the movie has subtitles */,
  "dubbed_versions" TEXT /* Languages in which the movie is dubbed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spoken_languages_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the actor in the cast list */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the crew member is associated with */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person (crew member) */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member belongs to */,
  "person_role" TEXT /* Role of the person */,
  "person_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the person's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the person */,
  "known_for_department" TEXT /* Department the person is known for */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the person */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the person */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the person */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the person */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the person's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the rating is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text (optional) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
